name: EdwLoadProvRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD,TRGT_SYS_CD,SUBJ_CD,MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) as RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD='IDS' AND SUBJ_CD='PROVIDERS' AND EDW_LOAD_IN='N' AND RUN_CYC_NO>=@{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD,TRGT_SYS_CD,SUBJ_CD) UPDATE c SET EDW_LOAD_IN='Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC c JOIN cte ON c.SRC_SYS_CD=cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND c.SUBJ_CD=cte.SUBJ_CD AND c.TRGT_SYS_CD=cte.TRGT_SYS_CD WHERE c.RUN_CYC_NO>=cte.RUN_CYC_NO AND c.EDW_LOAD_IN='N'

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2006 - 2009 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


CALLED BY: EdwProvCntl

                           
PROCESSING:  Extracts the P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with the EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'.  These rows are used to update the P_RUN_CYCLE, load indicator field for the particular source and subject.  All run cycles >= to the current run cycle where the indicator is "N" are updated to "Y".

Annotations:
Copy for pass thru
Job Name:
IdsEdwLoadProvRunCycUpd
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
